Text: I feel very perturbed
I feel uneasy about where this relationship is going
I am scared they will leave me
I feel anxious whenever they do not reply my messages
I feel insecure when I am ignored
I feel abandoned and alone
I feel rejected by someone I care about
I feel lonely even when people are around me
I feel emotionally drained
I feel hurt because they do not listen to me
I am angry because they lied to me
I feel betrayed and frustrated
I am irritated because nobody respects my boundaries
I feel bitter about what happened
I feel deeply loved and appreciated
I care deeply about this person
I feel emotionally connected to them
I feel grateful and peaceful
I feel hopeful about my future
I feel relieved after speaking honestly
I feel shocked by what they said
I feel surprised by their reaction
